sourceNotes.title: 河北省2025年普通高校招生物理科目组合、历史科目组合考生成绩统计表
sourceNotes.usage: 用于把河北2025同科类普通高考录取最低分换算为全省累计位次区间；不冒充院校原表直接公布的录取最低位次。

provenance.verification: all 1087 published cumulative-rank cells match between the 18-page authority PDF OCR and the independent structured mirror

sourceNotes.evidenceBoundary: The authority PDF publishes provincial score-to-cumulative-rank tables. It does not publish any institution's native minimum admission rank; linked admission ranks remain score-derived provincial segment ranges.
